the native has had no issues born
to him, even though married to 4 wives. Readers may also
examine the strength of Beeja in this horoscope by applying
the principles given on pace 72.
The Fifth house.—The 5th house in Chart No. 92 is
Gemini, a common sign, and is unafflicted either by aspect
or association.
The Fifth Lord.—Mercury the lord is no doubt exalted
but he is considerably afflicted by association with three
malefics, viz., the Sun, Mars and Ketu.
Putrakaraka.—The karaka, Jupiter, is in Scorpio, a
malefic sign aspected by Saturn.
Conclusion.—While the karaka and the house are
moderately blemished, the lord is considerably afflicted.

The Fifth House 227
Chart No. 92.— Born on 30-9-1912 at 5-15 p.m.
(I.S.T.) (Lat. 30° 19' N., Long. 75' 25' E.)
Balance of Sun Dasa at birth : Years 3-1-16. From
Chandra Lagna, the 5th house and the 5th lord are subject
to a number of afflictions. Consequently the native did not
have any issue. He died before the completion of Rahu
Dasa.
